query: SELECT id, code, title, cpdHours FROM courses WHERE title LIKE '%Pastoral%' OR title LIKE '%Counseling%' OR title LIKE '%Ethics%' OR title LIKE '%Care%' OR code = 'CHAP101' ORDER BY title;
